{{CargoOrgan
|name=Hard Horns
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10648
|idx=4
|description=Rhinoceros: No trading, no killing...
Antelopes: No trading, no killing...
Demons: No trading, no killing...
|skill=Summon Thunder Horn, dealing DMG equal to 145% of ATK!
|hp=460
|def=45
|atk=47
|rush=69
|gene1=In explorations, {race} ATK +20
|gene2=In explorations, Ignore DEF +5%
|gene7=In explorations, {race} ATK +60 (Awakened)
|}}
